title: A Day at the Lake Exhibition
article_text: I used to go to the lake every summer during my childhood. One day, I saw an exhibition about regional art. The producer was a tall man who used to be a politician. He was angry because an incident had caused a temporary delay. I slipped on a wet floor and knocked over a seed display. The immediate reaction was to help me stand up. The producer said that the accident would not imply any fault of mine. He also said that his salary was not high, but he was happy. To illustrate his point, he showed me a draft of a new painting. I ate breakfast with him and we discussed liberal ideas about art and emotion.
